form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at Kenilworth December 17 over 1400m, 7 len behind Wyze Declaration carrying 59kg at $6. Previously first up; third of 12 at Durbanville October 18 over 1250m, 0.6 len behind Midnight Lady carrying 59kg at $3.50. Should be right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Previously first up; third of 12 at Durbanville October 18 over 1250m, 0.6 len behind Midnight Lady carrying 59kg at $3.50. Should be right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard in the early and middle stages.
The saddle slipped back in running.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 8 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 2 len behind Ada Lovelace carrying 60kg at $7. Before that 7th of 11 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Trip Of Faith with 60kg at $13.50. Made headway last time. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). At the latest run 2nd of 8 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 2 len behind Ada Lovelace carrying 60kg at $7. Before that 7th of 11 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Trip Of Faith with 60kg at $13.50. Made headway last time. Top chance.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 4th of 7 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, slow going 3 len behind Onceinabluemoon carrying 60kg at $34. The start before that 3rd of 11 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Trip Of Faith with 60kg at $126. Rates highly and is among the main hopes.

formComments.title: TAB

The start before that 3rd of 11 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Trip Of Faith with 60kg at $126. Rates highly and is among the main hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, bumped out by Maria La Gorda.
Jockey J Penny did not persevere with his riding from the 200m

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last run ran last of 8 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 18 len behind Ada Lovelace carrying 60kg at $41. At only start last preparation 8th of 12 at this track on June 8 over 1160m, 8 len behind Tuscan Romance with 60kg at $101. Needs more time.

At only start last preparation 8th of 12 at this track on June 8 over 1160m, 8 len behind Tuscan Romance with 60kg at $101. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign when last of 15 at Vaal November 20 over 1400m, 27 len behind Dondoyaki carrying 58kg at $126. Previously first up; second last of 9 at Vaal August 30 over 1450m, 13 len behind Zahra Dominia with 60kg at $26. Others rate better.

previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 4th in a small field at Vaal on March 5 over 1200m, 17 len behind Grande Hawaii with 60kg at $8. Last start in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1160m, 7 len behind Ocean Mistress carrying 57kg at $51. Improved second outing and has further upside. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Raced twice to date. At debut, 4th in a small field at Vaal on March 5 over 1200m, 17 len behind Grande Hawaii with 60kg at $8. Last start in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1160m, 7 len behind Ocean Mistress carrying 57kg at $51. Improved second outing and has further upside. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow, losing three lengths and thereafter slow into stride.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly who is first starter by Danon Platina out of New Wave. Has the right credentials to run a forward race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old filly who is first starter by Danon Platina out of New Wave. Has the right credentials to run a forward race.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 3rd in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1160m, 4.5 len behind Ocean Mistress carrying 57kg at $4.50. Before that 3rd in a small field at this track in LR on March 7 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind World Attraction carrying 54.5kg at $67. Stakes placed two back. Overdue and gets chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Directed inwards at the 150m to continue its run.
Jumped outwards sharply leaving the stalls and carried Skizzle Drum out.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At very big odds at debut, 5th of 9 at this track on March 14 over 1000m, 5 len behind Love Not War carrying 60kg at $126. Last start 8th of 11 at Vaal on March 31 over 1200m, 7 len behind Viking Lass carrying 60kg at $34. Impossible to entertain.

previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 5th of 7 at Vaal on January 17 over 1000m, 10 len behind Flower Island carrying 57.5kg at $67. Went for a break before returning 3rd of 7 at Vaal on March 26 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Lanzarote carrying 60kg at $34. This will test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 400m, hung out and shifted out away from the crop.
